posts.text:
Defining remark of our era.


Disclose.tv (@disclosetv)

NOW - Netanyahu: "Jesus Christ has no advantage over Genghis Khan. Because if you are strong enough, ruthless enough, powerful enough, evil will overcome good."

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/disclosetv/status/2034713271517794575#m

I’m always extremely reluctant to use the word evil but how else to describe what we are deliberating doing to millions of Cubans?


Erik Sperling (@ErikSperling)

As US starves Cuba of energy & food, neocon Cotton wants DOD to be ready for a "humanitarian crisis," "flow of refugees," or "civil disorder" in Cuba 

Southcom is "prepared to support DHS in a mass migration event" including a "camp to deal with those migrants" at Gitmo, he says

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/ErikSperling/st

Many of those in rehab were likely forced there, adding to the tragedy. As @sethharpesq reported in The Fort Bragg Cartel, the U.S. role in fueling our own opioid epidemic remains one of the most hidden-in-plain-sight stories of the past few decades.

The severe need for drug rehab in Afghanistan is a remnant of the U.S. occupation, which unleashed a torrent of heroin on both the American and Afghan populations. Both are still recovering, even as the Taliban has largely eradicated poppy crops. Now hundreds in treatment have been killed by the U.S. backed dictatorship in Pakistan dropsitenews.com/p/kabul-afg…

Journalist who survived Israeli strike says it’s false to say he was warned ahead of time


Steve Sweeney (@SweeneySteve)

Today I$rael tried to kill me in a targeted airstrike in southern Lebanon as I was reporting on was the targeting of bridges and the forced displacement of 1 million people, an ethnic cleansing operation on a larger scale than the Nakba

I have absolutely no doubt that this was deliberate. Despite claims there were no warnings ahead of the strike and no notifications sent to

ISRAEL Has "Always Been" a LIABILITY to the United States
What I’m wondering is whether there is anyone in the leadership of our country who feels any responsibility for anything or are we all just along for whatever ride Trump is in the mood for everyday?
Video: OSINTdefender via X (@sentdefender)
How does Trump think he’s going to cash out his crypto, or prop up the Ponzi scheme that is the AI economy, without Gulf money? And where does he think their money comes from?

🇮🇷💢 Iran’s leadership vows retaliation after killings of top sec. officials

Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Hosseini Khamenei warned those responsible “will soon pay” after the killing of Dr. Ali Larijani — Sec. of the Supreme Nat'l Security Council & the Leader’s rep. — along with...

CNN interviewed Qusai Abu al-Kebash, a 29-year-old Palestinian shepherd, who was sexually assaulted by Israeli settlers in the occupied West Bank village of Khirbet Humsa.

He told Jeremy Diamond that settlers zip-tied his genitals, paraded him through the village while beating him, threatened to...

🇴🇲 FM of Oman in The Economist yesterday: 

“Iran’s retaliation against what it claims are American targets on the territory of its neighbours was an inevitable, if deeply regrettable and completely unacceptable, result. Faced with what both Israel and America described as a war designed to...
In Thomas Piketty’s Capital he lays out how the two times the globe significantly reduced wealth inequality was WW1 and WW2, by destroying vast amounts of wealth.
I was thinking maybe a small carbon tax or something, and some renewable energy credits, but wow he’s just going for it all
Trump is doing more to destroy the fossil fuel industry and smash the sources of wealth that fuel inequality than the wildest socialist eco-terrorist could ever dream of

⭕️ New: Trump says US “knew nothing” about strike as fires rage at Qatar LNG site

Fires were still burning at Qatar’s Ras Laffan industrial city – the world’s largest LNG export hub – after an Iranian ballistic missile strike caused “extensive damage,” when QatarEnergy confirmed a second round of...

🇸🇦💢Saudi FM attacks Iran as reports point to private push for escalation

Reports from The Washington Post, The New York Times, & Reuters indicate Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman has privately encouraged Trump to launch, maintain, or intensify strikes on Iran, despite Riyadh’s public...

💢 Iran struck major energy infrastructure across the Gulf on Wed, Thu in retaliation for US-Israeli strikes on South Pars gas field, hitting sites tied to global oil and gas supply. Here’s a breakdown:

🔸Qatar — Ras Laffan LNG hub: The world’s largest natural gas export facility was hit, with at...

Cannon image saying things like Jon Levine has said as an adult and then feeling like I had the moral standing to sift through a 15 year old’s Pinterest posts and moralize about them. Ignore this freak.
Outrageous murder-suicide unfolding for no reason. Iran put a strong deal on the table but we decided to destroy the world instead.
Starting to think this war might not be a good idea

Mexico planning to move forward with Cuban oil shipments

Interesting decision. Ok, then, let's do it.

Tom Barrack may be the first administration official to talk openly about Epstein’s power in the 1980s. He says everyone assumed that power came from his ties to the Israelis. Fits with our Iran-Contra reporting.
Afghans Search for Missing Family Members After Strike on Rehab Center Kills At Least 400 (by Emran Feroz)
Iran hits Gulf oil facilities with retaliatory strikes; Global energy markets shaken; Lebanon death toll tops 1,000 (by Drop Site News)

Grieving Parents in Iran Spend Every Night at the Graves of Their Children, Killed by U.S. Strike (by mahmoud aslan). As Ramadan comes to a close, families in Minab, Iran struggle to come to terms with the scale of death, one of the deadliest single attacks on children in memory.
Israel strikes largest Iranian gas field, central Beirut; What AIPAC got for $22 million in Illinois; U.S. hits Iran missiles sites near Strait of Hormuz (by Drop Site News)

As Israel Calls for an Uprising in Iran, Basij Militias Vow to Crush Opposition to the State (by Drop Site News). Israel assassinated the head of the Basij and has been bombing its checkpoints across Iran.

The Iran War Rages On: Israeli Assassination Strikes, Steve Witkoff's Texts, and the Mounting Storm in the Strait of Hormuz (by Drop Site News). Jeremy Scahill and Ryan Grim discuss the latest with Foad Izadi and and Emran Feroz.
Israel says it killed top Iranian security official; Pakistan bombing kills hundreds in Kabul; Cuba hit by blackout amid Trump blockade (by Drop Site News)
As the Gulf Burns, Political Uncertainty Looms Over Iraq (by Drop Site News). Nouri al-Maliki, the former prime minister, is grooming himself for another stint in power as war consumes Iraq.

Israel Killed Over a Dozen Lebanese Paramedics in Three Days, Now Claiming That Ambulances Are “Hezbollah” Targets (by Lylla Younes). Among the most targeted groups of Israel’s expanded war on Lebanon have been medical workers. Hezbollah’s Islamic Health Authority has been the hardest hit.

Iranian Officials Say They Have Been Ignoring Witkoff's Private Requests to Talk (by Jeremy Scahill). Trump's special envoy has been texting Iran’s foreign minister asking to start talks. Tehran says the war will end only when Iran believes it has established long-term deterrence.
Trump struggles to secure Strait of Hormuz; Israel launches ground invasion of Lebanon; North Korea conducts new missile tests (by Drop Site News)
15,000 targets struck in Iran, Hegseth says; Lebanon is near a “breaking point”; U.S. temporarily lifts Russian oil sanctions (by Drop Site News)

Behind the Bombs, New Details Emerge on Iran’s Infiltration of Israel (by Jeremy Scahill). As arrests grow in Israel, internal Iranian intelligence materials reviewed by Drop Site shed light on Tehran’s clandestine attempts to turn Israeli citizens into spies.
UN says 3.2 million displaced in Iran; 40+ senators press Hegseth over Iran school bombing; Drone strikes in Sudan kill dozens of civilians (by Drop Site News)

Rescue Efforts in Tehran After a Triple Strike Hit Apartment Buildings, Killing 40 (by mahmoud aslan). “Every time we lifted a stone, we increased our sense that we might succeed in saving a life, or that we might find someone who could not be saved.”
Trump went to war to distract from his JE scandal, according to a majority of Americans in a new survey we commissioned.
The Gulf Arab countries are losing their minds
Confirmed: US missiles struck the girls school in Minab
What actually happened in Minneapolis
JD Vance is just lying
